About

Strategy that ships.
Content that travels.

I'm an Account Executive at White Rivers Media, managing content strategy and campaign execution for Sony Music India and Zee Marathi, contributing to digital properties generating 95M+ monthly views.

I've worked on campaigns for Salman Khan, Aamir Khan, Badshah, Mika Singh, Pritam, Neha Kakkar, Rajkummar Rao, and the Lagaan 25th Anniversary. I build at the intersection of entertainment, creator culture, and social strategy: from greenlit campaign concepts to content systems that publish daily at scale.

Before this I built and ran three content brands, developed pitch decks that won government proposals, and led content operations for an Indian Gen Z consumer research platform. I'm also a surfer.

Experience

Where I've built.

May 2026 – Present White Rivers Media
Account Executive — Sony Music India & Zee Marathi

Managing content strategy, campaign execution, performance reporting, and direct client communication across two major entertainment accounts. Contributing to digital properties generating 95M+ monthly views. Developed five Awarapan 2 campaign concepts, all selected and executed by the Sony Music India client team. Lead end-to-end reel planning: hook identification, audio timestamps, lyric entry points, clip sequencing, and visual storytelling. Worked on campaigns for Salman Khan, Aamir Khan, Badshah, Lagaan 25th Anniversary, Cocktail 2, and multiple Sony Music releases.

Entertainment Marketing Campaign Strategy Sony Music India Zee Marathi Client Management
Aug 2025 – Apr 2026 White Rivers Media
Strategy & Founder's Office Intern

Managed three SAANSE content brands (Ancient India by SAANSE, Bharat Ki Kahaniyaan, Shraddha Ka Naya Dwaar) from strategy to publishing, building a combined audience of 270K+ followers across accounts. Built AI-powered content production workflows using Midjourney, ElevenLabs, Gemini Gems, Custom GPTs, and Higgsfield. Led festive campaigns across Ganesh Utsav, Navratri, and Diwali, all independently planned and delivered. Worked directly with founders on strategic planning.

270K+ Followers AI Production SAANSE Content Strategy ORM
Jan – Apr 2025 Capital Z
Content & Research Lead — Gen Z Research Platform

Built the organisation's entire content operation covering pillars, publishing workflows, reporting frameworks, editorial planning. Conducted ongoing Gen Z behaviour research across digital culture, platform consumption, and emerging trends. Launched three consumer insight reports. Coordinated website development from content architecture to launch. Developed Instagram strategy for cricketer Krunal Pandya. Solely authored 40+ slide pitch decks, contributing to three successful Punjab Government proposal wins across infrastructure, electricity access, water management, and women's welfare.

3 Gov't Proposals Won Gen Z Research Pitch Decks Influencer Strategy Content Operations
Feb – Apr 2025 Ukiyo Stays
Brand Strategy Intern — Luxury Hospitality

Executed integrated marketing campaigns across social media, influencer marketing, and brand activations. Contributed to luxury brand positioning, audience targeting, and influencer partnership coordination. Winner — Pitch Deck Competition, Swami Vivekanand Business School.

Pitch Deck Winner Luxury Marketing Influencer Partnerships
